text.name_changer.usage:
Commands:
/nick name <name>
/nick reset
/nick hide on|off (OP only)
(Hold U to reveal names temporarily)
text.name_changer.nick_too_long: Name is longer than %s characters (including spaces) — not changed
text.name_changer.hide_on: Hide all names: ON (Hold U to reveal real names temporarily)
